codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. All requirements fulfilled: motion package installed (v12.38.0), Inter font loaded via next/font/google and applied to body, tailwind.config.ts extended with 7 semantic color groups (primary, accent, success, warning, error, surface, muted) each with 50-900 shades, 3 custom boxShadow values (soft, card, elevated), 2 custom borderRadius values (card, modal), LazyMotion with domAnimation wrapping app tree in LayoutWrapper.tsx, and all hard-coded hex color values replaced with semantic Tailwind classes across 17 .tsx files. Zero hard-coded hex color classes remain (verified via ripgrep). All 250 tests pass. Uses `m` components (not `motion`) inside LazyMotion for bundle optimization. Test expectations updated in BottomTabNavigation.test.tsx to match new semantic classes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md already documents the motion/Tailwind design token conventions comprehensively, including the rule against arbitrary hex values and the LazyMotion/m component pattern. No gaps found — the worker's implementation aligns perfectly with documented conventions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md 'Motion/Framer Motion' and 'Tailwind Design Tokens' sections cover all patterns used in this feature.

summary: Re-review (round 2) confirms the design-system-foundation feature remains valid and complete. All 6 expected behaviors verified: motion package present in package.json, LazyMotion with domAnimation wraps the app tree, tailwind.config.ts has 7 semantic color groups (exceeding the 6+ requirement) plus 3 shadows and 2 border-radius values, Inter font loaded and applied to body, zero hard-coded hex color classes in .tsx files, and tests pass. No blocking or non-blocking issues found. Code quality is good with consistent semantic class naming throughout.
